title: feat: add community text endpoints
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds Enter dashboard/API registration for OpenAI-compatible community text endpoints.
- Adds the Drizzle/D1 `community_endpoint` table and stores bearer tokens encrypted.
- Exposes `community/{username}/{model-id}` IDs with description and per-1M-token Pollen pricing.
- Lists published community models for everyone in `/models`, `/text/models`, `/v1/models`, and the dashboard Models page.
- Routes community models through normal text call paths: `/v1/chat/completions`, `/text`, and `/text/{prompt}`.
- Supports community streaming, requests upstream usage, and passes upstream response model names through unchanged.
- Charges community usage through the normal deduction path using upstream-reported usage and dynamic model pricing.
- Keeps community runtime lookup in a small gen module; generic handlers only attach the resolved endpoint.
- Sorts dashboard community model prices from the dynamic model-list data instead of the static registry.
- Merges latest `origin/main` into the branch.

Validation:
- `git diff --check`
- `npx biome check --write enter.pollinations.ai/vite.config.ts`
- Enter: `npx vitest run test/community-endpoint-openai.test.ts test/pricing-data.test.ts`
- Enter: `npm run build:frontend`
- Enter: `npm run typecheck` still fails on broad dashboard/UI declaration required-prop errors unrelated to the merge resolution.
- Gen: `npx vitest run src/community-endpoints.test.ts test/model-permissions.test.ts`
- Gen: `npx tsc --noEmit`
- Local: `http://localhost:8788/v1/models` and `/text/models` list community models with normal text endpoints.

gist.headline: Bring your own brain
gist.blurb: The hive is officially open to outside pollen. You can now plug your own OpenAI-compatible endpoints into the network, set your price, and share your models with the world.
gist.summary: Added dashboard registration for OpenAI-compatible community text endpoints, routing them through standard API paths as `community/{username}/{model-id}` with custom per-1M-token pricing.
gist.impact: Developers can now monetize their own hosted models directly through our infrastructure, while users gain access to a decentralized registry of community-run AI.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy community market or farm stand in a digital garden. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot are setting up shop, displaying glowing orbs (models) that represent community contributions.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot running a small wooden farm stand in a digital garden. The stand displays glowing, colorful orbs representing community AI models. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text on a small pixel sign: 'COMMUNITY'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
